dashboard_config_suggestion: Configure Linda AI tags to improve automatic segmentation and personalized responses for your customers.
dashboard_social_total_reach_tooltip: I measure how far your posts reach and how many people are seeing your message
dashboard_social_reach_per_post_tooltip: This is the average number of people who see your posts.
dashboard_social_engagement_tooltip: I measure the interest and relevance that your content generates in your audience
dashboard_social_top_posts_title: Top 5 publications with the greatest reach
dashboard_no_data_message: Oops, it looks like you don't have any data yet.
dashboard_no_data_ready_description: As soon as you record your first activities, you'll see your charts come to life.
dashboard_notifications_channel_descript: I've noticed that {highestChannel} has a {readRateHighestChannel}% performance rate, significantly outperforming {lowestChannel}. I recommend leveraging this channel to maximize your conversions.
dashboard_interaction_rate_tooltip: I calculate this based on the clicks and responses your campaign received.
dashboard_conversion_rate_tooltip: I measure how many of your contacts took a specific action after the campaign, such as buying or registering
dashboard_return_on_investment_tooltip: I calculate how much you're earning for every dollar you invest in your marketing campaigns and strategies.
dashboard_operational_summary_intro: Your business continues to move forward this month and I want to share the most important things with you.
dashboard_operational_summary_campaigns: Together we launched {campaignsTotal} campaigns that connected very well with your audience.
dashboard_operational_summary_contacts_g: Your contacts are growing (+{pct}%), which means your brand is reaching more people every day.
dashboard_operational_summary_conversati: I responded to nearly {conversationsTotal} conversations, and most of your customers received quick and helpful answers.
dashboard_operational_summary_unused_tag: However, I detected {unusedCount} opportunities to improve your targeting with tags that you are not yet taking advantage of.
dashboard_operational_summary_network: I also noticed that {network} is your strongest channel right now, with good engagement from your audience.
dashboard_operational_summary_growth: There's room to grow: If we optimize notifications and make better use of tags, we could significantly increase your conversions.
dashboard_alerts_section_title: I have identified the areas that require attention.
dashboard_alerts_section_description: I reviewed your business and found a few areas that need attention. If we work on them together, we can significantly improve your results. Here are my recommendations:
dashboard_alert_social_content: I prepared content for your social media
dashboard_alert_social_content_desc: I analyzed what types of posts best connect with your audience. I have ideas ready to keep your social media active.
dashboard_alert_knowledge_gaps: I need you to teach me more
dashboard_alert_knowledge_gaps_desc: I've identified some frequently asked questions that I'm not yet able to answer well. If you teach me more, I'll be able to better serve your customers.
dashboard_alert_unanswered_conversations: There are messages awaiting a response.
I detected conversations that need your attention because they involve decisions that only you can make.
dashboard_alert_suggested_campaign: I put together a campaign for you
dashboard_alert_suggested_campaign_desc: I reviewed your contacts' behavior and found the ideal moment. I already have a proposal ready with personalized messages.
